## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated (TDD) and `npm run test:coverage` passes (≥ 90%)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] Conventional commit messages (`feat(scope): …`, `fix(scope): …`)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or commands changed
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or customer data in the diff
